description_long: This is a pair of Adidas Tango Rosario footballs, each featuring a classic black and white color scheme with a distinctive interlocking panel design. The surface is composed of alternating black hexagonal and white curved panels, creating a visually striking geometric pattern. The branding 'Tango Rosario' is clearly printed on the white panels, indicating the model and style. The footballs have a smooth, slightly glossy finish, typical of synthetic leather used in modern footballs. The seams between the panels are visible, suggesting a machine-stitched construction. These footballs are designed for durability and optimal performance in urban environments such as parks, streets, or sports courts.
description: A pair of Adidas Tango Rosario footballs with a black and white geometric panel design and visible branding, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Adidas Tango Rosario branding and the iconic black and white panel pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the panels and the seamless spherical shape, with less visible branding.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the black and white panels without visible text.
description_view_3: Rear side view focusing on the panel geometry and overall roundness, with no branding visible.
